ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: RecordType.DeveloperName = "Wolves" && ISPICKVAL(StageName , "Live") && OR (ISBLANK(Bintray_Password__c),ISBLANK(Bintray_ID__c), ISBLANK( Bintray_Entitlement__c ))&& NOT(ISPICKVAL(Type,"Strategic Partnership" ))&& ISPICKVAL(Wolves_Platform__c ,"Android") && NOT($Profile.Id='00eb0000000oBvcAAE')
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please check that none of those fields are blank: -Bintray Password -Bintray ID -Bintray Entitlement
